response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on the Windows platform required for this role. Their background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and embedded systems with languages like JavaScript, TypeScript, D, and Node.js, and they do not demonstrate domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking. While they have strong technical skills in other areas, their profile does not align closely enough with the core requirements of the job.
strengths: Extensive experience in software development across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded systems)
Strong background in test-driven development (TDD), CI/CD, and modern software engineering practices
Proven ability to work in diverse tech stacks and adapt to new technologies quickly
concerns: No significant experience with C++ on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No demonstrated domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking
Limited exposure to SQL Server/Oracle or messaging frameworks (Kafka, MQ)
